stemHtml: What does the term "simplex communication" mean?

options.a: One-way communication from aircraft to stations or locations on the surface of the Earth.
options.b: Any transmission, emission, or reception of signs, signals, writing, images, and sounds.
options.c: Communication between two stations that can take place in both directions simultaneously.
options.d: Communication between two stations which takes place in one direction at a time.
